headline: Nucor Projects Earnings to Increase in Q2 on Higher Prices
summary: NUE sees Q2 EPS rising sharply from Q1 and year-ago levels, with segment gains, pricing strength and shareholder returns in focus.

raw.headline: Nucor Projects Earnings to Increase in Q2 on Higher Prices
raw.summary: NUE sees Q2 EPS rising sharply from Q1 and year-ago levels, with segment gains, pricing strength and shareholder returns in focus.

headline: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Nucor Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Investing in certain stocks can pay off in the long run, especially if you hold on for a decade or more.

headline: STLD Expects Q2 Earnings to Rise on Solid Demand & Higher Steel Prices
summary: Steel Dynamics sees Q2 EPS rising sharply on stronger steel and aluminum profits, despite a write-down tied to moving a planned recycled slab center.

raw.headline: STLD Expects Q2 Earnings to Rise on Solid Demand & Higher Steel Prices
raw.summary: Steel Dynamics sees Q2 EPS rising sharply on stronger steel and aluminum profits, despite a write-down tied to moving a planned recycled slab center.
